title: App not displaying due to too many redirects
symptom: The app fails to load in preview or live mode, displaying a 'too many redirects' error in the browser.
applies_when: Attempting to view the app in preview or live mode
not_this_if: The app loads correctly in other modes
root_cause: The error occurs when there are circular redirects between two or more pages, causing the browser to enter an infinite loop. This can happen if a private page redirects to another private page, or if two pages redirect to each other.
fix_steps: Review the redirect settings in your app's workflow
Identify any circular redirects between pages
Adjust the redirects to prevent loops
Test the app in preview mode again
agent_instruction: Check and correct any circular redirects in your app's workflow.
